creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text: I would say the description in /usr/src/etc/shells is right and chpass is fine. The fact that people at some point took it as "list of all available shells" is the problem. One might even argue ports shouldn't touch /etc/shells at all, that it's up to the admin to decide which shells are acceptable. So, I would agree the man page for shells(5) is off and at the least the ports that add restricted shells to /etc/shells should be changed.
